images.caption: Figure 1:Overall Processing Pipeline. Spatial and temporal complexity calculated using the video complexity analyzer (VCA)[21]
Figure 2:Example crops from theDaydreamersequence using 360p AV1 source encodings.
Figure 5:Overall results and results per codec / setting with 95% CI Intervals
Figure 6:Upsampling methods results per degraded video, with the best improvements over the baseline (Lanczos) highlighted. The dashed lines show the MOS for the original source files.

Figure 7:Spearman correlation difference (×100\times 100) without each method / source compared to the overall within-sequence result. HighΔ\DeltaSRCC point toward a metric failing to integrate a given method / source into the overall result.
Figure 8:Prediction difference between Lanczos / SeedVR2 and each method. Red shows how much a metric overpredicts a given method [Δ\DeltaMOS×10\times 10].

Figure 9:MOS compared to the metric results. Each metric axis ismapped per sourceto the ACR scale using third-order mapping following ITU-T Rec. P.140[11]. The top left corner shows the mean within-sequence SRCC result.
